description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light beige or off-white fabric. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are straight, broad, and extend from the base to the height of the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, geometric profile. The legs are not distinctly visible, suggesting a block or recessed base that gives the appearance of the sofa sitting directly on the floor. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting. This sofa would be suitable for urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered lounges.
description: A modern, three-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform attached cushions, and light beige upholstery in a minimalist, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, tall armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back with no visible seams or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the straight armrest and cushion profile seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, attached seat cushions and three matching attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad armrests at full seat height, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the sofa appears to have a block or recessed base, giving the impression of sitting directly on the floor.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest segmented into three attached cushions, matching the seat cushion arrangement, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery in a light beige tone, with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, stitching, or tufting.
